NEOW.talk.FLANDREMOD-FLANDRE_CHARACTER.0: You are new to this Spire, little vampire. Choose a gift, and show me what your destruction becomes.
NEOW.talk.FLANDREMOD-FLANDRE_CHARACTER.1: Again you return, carrying eyes and hunger. Take a blessing before the climb.
NEOW.talk.FLANDREMOD-FLANDRE_CHARACTER.2: The Spire still has more for you to break. Choose.
